message:
test(insert): switch B3.4 probe to auto-rowid INSERTs and add cursor/btree profiling counters

Switch the B3.4 memory autocommit commit roundtrip probe from
explicit-rowid INSERTs (INSERT INTO t VALUES(?1, ?2)) to auto-rowid
INSERTs (INSERT INTO t(val) VALUES(?1)) to exercise the
implicit_rowid_hint fast path that production workloads typically
use.

- Add cursor_setup and btree_insert per-row microsecond breakdowns
  from the new prepared_direct_insert_cursor_setup_time_ns and
  prepared_direct_insert_btree_insert_time_ns profiling counters
- Add direct_insert_executions counter output for visibility
- Update parameter arrays to pass only the val column

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
